name: Current Date & Time
description: Get the current date, time, and timezone information

skill.name: current_datetime
skill.description: Get the current date and time
skill.system_prompt: You have access to a tool that returns the current date and time. Use it whenever the user asks about today's date, the current time, or any time-related question. Always call the tool rather than guessing the date or time.

tools.name: get_current_datetime
tools.description: Returns the current date, time, day of week, and timezone

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Defaults to UTC.
